name: Lawyer Fees South Salt Lake Comp

mainEntity.name: How much does workers comp lawyer cost in South Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: How much does workers comp lawyer cost in South Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Contingency: 20% of settlement, no upfront fees. Utah caps attorney fees at 15-20%.

suggestedAnswer.text: South Salt Lake firms like Just Work Comp take cases no-win-no-fee. Fees deducted from award; evaluate if lawyer increases net recovery (often yes vs insurer lowballs). Free evals compare offers.

description: Contingency: 20% of settlement, no upfront fees. Utah caps attorney fees at 15-20%.
